grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  www.nature.com/scientificreports OPEN Synergistic augmentation of BDS PPP-B2b: integrating LEO constellations and wide- lane ambiguity resolution for instantaneous convergence Qing Zhao1,2, Shuguo Pan1,2, Wang Gao1,2, Xianlu Tao1,2, Hong Huang1,2, Moye Zhang1,2 & Qiang Wang3 To address the slow convergence issue of PPP-B2b, this paper proposes a positioning method that integrate
The results demonstrate that both WAR and LEO enhancement can improve the accuracy and convergence performance of PPP-B2b, with temporal complementarity during the convergence stage.
